prompt: I need to understand why enterprise customers keep asking for custom reporting. Create an interview guide targeting CFOs and finance directors at companies with 500+ employees.
assertions: Questions are appropriate for C-level stakeholders
Duration is appropriate for executive availability (30-45 minutes)
Core discovery focuses on reporting workflow pain, not feature wish lists
Includes probes for budget and decision-making authority
The five design principles are followed (behaviour over opinion, past over hypothetical, problem before solution, silence is data, why five times)
